plugins.name: skill-tools
plugins.description: Skill management commands: list all skills (中文), show enable scope, and recommend skills for the current project.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Commands-only build of ponytail (lazy senior dev / anti-over-engineering). No auto-firing hooks; the main mode is explicit-invoke only.

plugins.name: media-tools
plugins.description: Client-ready media prep: video->GIF, PowerPoint->high-fidelity PDF (LibreOffice), and PDF compression (Ghostscript) for emailing. Requires ffmpeg, ghostscript, libreoffice.

plugins.name: taiwan-biz-research
plugins.description: Taiwan economic and market data for business-case research: NDC business-cycle light with components (1984-), household income/spending by county and category mix (1976-), and bottom-up market sizing — all from free government open data.
